name: NexaTrace
description: AI-powered cybersecurity company specializing in email protection. Their advanced platform detects and prevents phishing, malware, and spam threats before they reach user assets. They provide threat landscape visualization showing types of threats detected, their frequency, and emerging trends and patterns. The platform also enables active threat management by tracking ongoing threats requiring attention and those that have been successfully mitigated.
services: AI-powered email cybersecurity, Phishing detection and prevention, Malware detection and prevention, Spam detection and prevention, Threat landscape visualization, Active threat monitoring and mitigation, Threat trend analysis
relevance: Direct match - AI cybersecurity company with email protection focus
